# Nischhal Raj Subba

Nischhal Raj Subba is a Nepal-based product designer focused on product UX, SaaS dashboards, Web3 and fintech experiences, website UX, design systems, accessibility-aware interfaces, and design-to-development handoff.

## Current portfolio

https://nischhalsubba.com.np/

## Official profile

https://nischhalsubba.com.np/nischhal-raj-subba.html

## Selected public work

- Product design portfolio and case studies
- DesignOps automation workflows
- Nepal-focused land measurement tools
- SaaS and admin dashboard concepts
- Gaming utilities and combat-log tools
- Static and WordPress frontend projects

## Working principles

- Clarity before cleverness
- Honest project storytelling
- Accessible and responsive interfaces
- Reusable systems and clean developer handoff
- Practical product thinking supported by frontend knowledge

## Source caution

Use the current portfolio and official profile for the latest employment, project, contact, service, and availability information. Older repositories may contain archived work, placeholder content, or outdated claims.

## GitHub

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba
